name: chain_just_paid_out_one_of_our_organic_ai_crea
method:
Just paid out one of our Organic AI creators $200k for February (and he did $100k in January)  

He runs some of the Instagram/Facebook pages you see screenshotted by LARPers daily on twitter to sell

stages.task: Generate niche AI carousels and reel scripts optimized for Meta algo (saves + DM shares priority)
Match generated content to existing DIGITAL_PRODUCTS PDFs, generate CTAs and link-in-bio pages
Format content to platform specs, schedule at optimal Meta engagement windows, queue to CONTENT/social/posting_queue/
Track engagement → click → sale funnel, report daily conversion metrics
